name: Broiled Marinated Chicken Breasts LF
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle chicken on both sides with garlic, basil, thyme, and pepper.
2. Arrange chicken in a shallow bowl.
3. Mix together vinegar and orange juice and pour over chicken.
4. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
5. Place chicken on broiler pan.
6. Set temperature control to Broil (500°F).
7. Arrange oven rack so chicken is about 4 inches from heat.
8. Broil, turning occasionally, about 6 minutes per side or until fork can be inserted in chicken with ease.
9. Sprinkle with salt and serve with wild rice, pouring pan drippings over rice.
10. Makes 2 servings.
